description_long: This is a modern two-story house surrounded by a wooden fence and lush green lawn, featuring a spacious backyard with a swimming pool, shaded pergola, and outdoor seating area. The house has a predominantly white exterior with large rectangular windows, a flat roof, and a glass-domed atrium at the center. The front facade includes a double garage, a main entryway with an arched opening, and a black metal gate. The backyard is bordered by dense hedges, providing privacy and a natural barrier. The layout includes multiple rooms, visible staircases, and open-plan living spaces, with outdoor amenities designed for relaxation and entertainment. The architectural style is characterized by clean lines, minimal ornamentation, and a focus on functional outdoor living.
description: A modern, white two-story house with large windows, a flat roof, and a spacious backyard featuring a pool, pergola, and dense hedges. The property is enclosed by a wooden fence and includes a double garage and a central glass atrium.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entryway, double garage, black metal gate, and a clear view of the glass-domed atrium.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the backyard with a swimming pool, pergola, and dense hedge along the property line.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the outdoor seating area, lush hedges, and the back facade with large windows and patio doors.
description_view_3: Opposite side view focusing on the pool, pergola, and the side elevation of the house with additional windows and access points.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large rectangular windows and a central glass atrium
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway with an arched opening, double doors, and a black metal gate, no porch or columns, minimal decorative elements
